## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `development` (not `main`)
- [ ] Pulled latest `development` before opening this PR
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`) — skip if no tests exist yet for this feature
- [ ] App builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Does not break other games or shared components
- [ ] No AI agent files added (`CLAUDE.md`, `AGENTS.md`, etc.)
- [ ] No AI co-author attribution in commits

- [ ] Bug fix
